ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "node_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the project node */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the project */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency responsible for the project */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the project */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "expected_savings" REAL /* Expected energy savings from the project */,
  "contact_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary contact person for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_contact_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_person_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the document belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_document_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "energy_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy data record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the energy data belongs to */,
  "consumption_date" TEXT /* Date of energy consumption */,
  "consumption_value" REAL /* Value of energy consumption (e.g., kWh) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of energy consumption */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the energy data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "savings" (
  "savings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each savings record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the savings data belongs to */,
  "savings_date" TEXT /* Date of energy savings */,
  "savings_value" REAL /* Value of energy savings (e.g., kWh) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of energy savings */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the savings data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("savings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_savings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed or modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission applies to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the permission applies to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the permission applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
